_comment: Authoring input for the fixture pipeline (WP-0). Phase 5 adds 10 historical disaster scenarios (T+N response windows) plus refreshed training ids. Observed weather aliases in observedWeather.ts map new ids to committed fixtures until dedicated fetches land in Phase 6.
_dateProvenance: Two kinds of realDate: documented = specific real incident; representative = seasonally appropriate day at real location.

scenarios.name: HIST — Kīlauea Leilani Estates Guidance (2018)
scenarios.note: T+48h guided extraction window — not peak lava entry.

scenarios.name: HIST — Oso SR-530 Landslide Recon (2014)
scenarios.note: Terrain fixture rationed for Phase 6 DEM fetch — committed.

scenarios.name: HIST — Hurricane Harvey TFR Deconfliction (2017)
scenarios.note: TFR + manned SAR deconfliction training hook.

scenarios.name: HIST — Camp Fire Paradise Mapping (2018)
scenarios.note: Post-fire mapping phase; terrain fixture committed in Phase 6.

scenarios.name: HIST — Surfside Champlain Towers Collapse (2021)
scenarios.note: Phase 6: small DEM + Overture building footprints committed.

scenarios.name: HIST — Hurricane Helene Asheville Comms Denial (2024)
scenarios.note: Mountain terrain fixture committed in Phase 6.

scenarios.name: HIST — Katrina Lower Ninth Triage (2005)
scenarios.note: T+72h triage window — counterfactual UAS capability backtest.

scenarios.name: HIST — Joplin EF-5 Damage Path (2011)
scenarios.note: NIST SP-1139 aligned linear damage path.

scenarios.name: HIST — Marshall Fire No-Launch Decision (2021)
scenarios.note: Peak-wind day intentional — launch refusal IS the lesson.

scenarios.name: SAR — Coastal / Ocean Beach
scenarios.note: Representative San Francisco summer marine-layer morning.

scenarios.name: USCG — Atlantic Mariner SAR (Training)
scenarios.note: Refreshed from Cape Cod SAR keeper.

scenarios.name: CAL FIRE / USFS — Wildfire Flank Recon (Training)
scenarios.note: Dixie Fire representative day; dedicated train_wildfire_flank DEM committed in Phase 6.

scenarios.name: LAFD / USCG — Port Hazmat Plume (Training)
scenarios.note: Refreshed Port of LA hazmat keeper.

scenarios.name: SAR — Mountain Trail Missing Hiker
scenarios.note: Front Range DEM committed in Phase 6.
